hero.titleLine2: Run your entire business from one platform.
hero.body: We handle incorporation, bookkeeping, audit, tax, legal, payroll, and compliance — all in one structured system.
hero.body2: Get a dedicated team, a one-to-one expert, and real-time visibility — so you can focus on growing your business.
hero.trustStrip: One team. One platform. Everything handled.

coreStatement.text: We manage everything your business needs — from incorporation to compliance — anywhere in the world.

valueSection.title: We don’t just provide services — we give you control
bullets: Real-time financial data on your dashboard
Direct access to your dedicated team
The ability to schedule calls anytime
valueSection.footer: So you always know what’s happening — without chasing anyone.

keyBenefits.title: Everything you need to run your business — without complexity

items.title: Track your business in real time
items.desc: No waiting. No uncertainty. Full visibility at all times.

items.desc: Deadlines, filings, and obligations are tracked and managed.

items.title: Save more on tax
items.desc: Structured setups and ongoing optimisation help you keep more.

items.title: Make better decisions
items.desc: Clear data and expert support — when you need it.

positioningLine.text: You shouldn’t need multiple providers to manage one business.

whatYouGet.title: A managed system — not just disconnected services
whatYouGet.cardBody: Fully integrated into your VACEI workspace for visibility and control.
items: Dedicated team assigned to your business
Your own portal to manage everything
whatYouGet.footer: You’re not hiring separate providers — you’re upgrading how your business is managed.

finalSection.body: From incorporation to bookkeeping, audit, tax, payroll, and compliance — everything runs through one platform with full visibility.
finalSection.note: Use all services or only what you need.
finalSection.finalLine: One team. One platform. Real-time visibility. Everything handled.

activeEU.body: VACEI provides the digital environment for international businesses and founders to incorporate, manage, and scale their European operations with confidence.

workspaceEntry.sectionBody:
Managing accounting, audit, legal, and compliance shouldn’t be fragmented.

VACEI brings everything into one structured platform — where your services, documents, and deadlines are managed in one place.

No emails. No scattered files. No uncertainty.
workspaceEntry.card1Body:
Create a workspace for your business and manage everything in one place.

Your services, documents, and advisors are structured through one platform — giving you full control without complexity.
workspaceEntry.card1CoordinationNote: All services are coordinated through VACEI and delivered through a network of trusted firms.
workspaceEntry.card2Body: Set up your company and centralise incorporation, approvals, compliance, and ongoing support in the same workspace you will use to run the business.
workspaceEntry.builderDescription: Complete incorporation, structural setup, and compliance ready in one unified package.

insightsResources.subtitle: Explore short videos, guides, and articles on accounting, audit, compliance, and business operations — designed to help businesses stay organised, informed, and ready to scale.

resources.title: How to prepare your business for a seamless audit
resources.desc: Discover the exact documents, workflows, and timelines required to navigate the audit process without friction.

resources.title: 3-minute guide to European corporate compliance
resources.desc: Watch a quick breakdown of exactly what documents and deadlines you need to manage when operating in the EU.

resources.title: The ultimate checklist for scaling your operations
resources.desc: Use this comprehensive checklist to ensure your legal, accounting, and operational infrastructure is ready to scale.

footerCta.body: Set up your portal today and get a clear, structured quote for your business within 24 hours.
